3907(1) {'1077': 433, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Show warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea.', '1088': 'Show warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea, gameplay, sailing', '1096': 'When enabled, shows a warning before drinking a forgotten drink from a crate at sea.', '1119': 1}
3908(1) {'1077': 434, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Sailing charting popups', '1088': 'sailing, notification, skilling, task, popup, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, completing charting something new will be accompanied by a popup box.'}
4698(1) {'1077': 435, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Sailing port task cancellation warning', '1088': 'sailing, cancel, port, warning, skilling, task, popup, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, players will not be warned when cancelling port tasks.'}
4732(1) {'1077': 436, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Current duck hintarrow', '1088': 'sailing, current, duck, hint, arrow, hintarrow, disable, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, a hintarrow will be placed over the head of your active current duck.'}
4733(1) {'1077': 437, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Barracuda trials hintarrow', '1088': 'sailing, barracuda, trial, bt, hint, arrow, hintarrow, disable, toggle', '1096': 'When enabled, a hintarrow will be placed over your current barracuda trials objective.'}
4734(1) {'739': 1, '1077': 438, '1078': 0, '1082': 3502, '1083': 3503, '1086': 'Enable interface resizing and repositioning', '1088': 'interface, menu, resize, reposition, move, size, position', '1096': 'When enabled, some interfaces can be resized and moved around. This only applies to select interfaces. This setting does not affect the world map, which can always be resized and repositioned.', '1116': 'You can only change this setting while playing in resizable mode.'}

5489 141 Complete 3 port tasks.
5490 141 Gather a piece of salvage.
5491 141 Identify a piece of salvage.
5492 141 Complete the Pandemonium quest.
5493 141 Chart 3 points of interest at sea.
5494 141 Complete the Tempor Tantrum trial once.
5495 141 Achieve the Swordfish rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 1 rum shipment and 14 supplies in 2:00.
5496 141 Achieve the Shark rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 2 rum shipments and 25 supplies in 3:06.
5497 141 Achieve the Marlin rank at the Tempor Tantrum by collecting 3 rum shipments and 36 supplies in 5:00.
5498 141 Open your Captain's Log to read about charting locations.
5499 141 Chart a location using your current duck.
5500 141 Chart a location with your spyglass.
5501 141 Chart a location with the help of a mermaid.
5502 141 Chart a location by helping a troll.
5503 141 Chart a location by prying open a crate with a crowbar and investigating the contents inside.
5504 141 Complete the Prying Times miniquest.
5505 141 Set foot on Dognose Island.
5506 141 Set foot on the Isle of Bones.
5507 141 Set foot on Last Light.
5508 141 Set foot on Charred Island.
5509 141 Build an Oak hull, to overcome gentle rapids.
5510 141 Build an Oak mast, to overcome stormy seas.
5511 141 Build a Bronze salvaging hook on your boat.
5512 141 Build a Wind Catcher on your boat.
5513 141 Claim a basic small boat from a Shipwright.
5514 140 [[0], [Introduction], [Learn the ropes of Sailing!], [Get your sea legs - and your first boat - with the introductory Sailing quest, <col=FF981F>Pandemonium</col>!

If you need a refresher later, check the <col=FF981F>FAQ</col> tab.], [1], [5492], [Where do I start the quest?, This quest can be started by talking to <col=FF981F>Will and Anne</col> near the food shop in Port Sarim., I left the Pandemonium early. How do I get back?, The ship that travels between Port Sarim and Musa Point now also visits the Pandemonium. Just ask <col=FF981F>Captain Tobias</col> in the middle of Port Sarim after your first visit!, Where do I get a boat?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> can sell you a new boat., How do I get on my boat?, Once you have a boat, you can board it by interacting with a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col>. Look for the <col=FF981F>white and red wind sock</col> on the southern dock at Port Sarim., How do I get off my boat?, You can disembark by sailing near a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col> and interacting with it from your boat., How do I sail my boat?, Interact with the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> at the back of your boat to start navigating. Use your <col=FF981F>Sails</col> to control your speed, and use the sea to turn., What does it mean when I feel a gust of wind?, Occasionally you'll feel a <col=FF981F>gust of wind</col>. This means the wind is blowing strongly. If you <col=FF981F>trim your sails while the wind is gusting</col>, your boat will get a temporary <col=FF981F>speed boost</col>!, I lost my boat! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> are able to retrieve and repair capsized boats - for a fee! You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat is at a different port! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> will retrieve boats from other ports for you, for a small amount of coins. You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat got stuck! How do I fix it?, You can access the <col=FF981F>reverse</col> option by stopping the boat and then clicking the down arrow on the sailing side panel, this should resolve most cases. If you are still stuck you can right-click the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> and select the <col=FF981F>escape</col> option.], [3721], [3623], [Starting this activity will un-finish the Pandemonium quest, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5515 140 [[1], [Port Tasks], [Complete jobs for rewards!], [Help needed!

The locals and merchants always need a hand, so visit one of the <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at a port to see what jobs are available.

Pick up cargo from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> and deposit it in your boat's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col> to complete deliveries at sea!

<col=9F9F9F>For this alpha, the selection of available tasks has been limited.], [3], [5489], [How do I get a port task?, Port Tasks are acquired by visiting <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at various ports. At Port Sarim, this is located near the southern-most port., How do I see my current task?, Your current task can be viewed by right-clicking your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> item and selecting <col=FF981F>View Task</col>. Your Captain's Log can be obtained from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I complete a courier task?, After acquiring a courier task, collect the required number of crates from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col>, board your boat, and deposit them in the <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>. Sail to the destination port, then withdraw and deliver your cargo to the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> there!, When do the available tasks change?, Tasks are <col=FF981F>endlessly repeatable</col>. Currently the pool of tasks change every day. However, the team is reviewing alternative ways of refresing the tasks available.], [30903], [3622], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 10, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5516 140 [[2], [Shipwreck Salvaging], [Gather sunken loot!], [One captain's misfortune is another captain's treasure!

Using the <col=FF981F>Salvaging Hook</col> facility on your boat, seek out wreckages of past voyages and recover lost goods with this <col=FF981F>AFK</col> activity.

Bring your salvage back to port and sort through it at a <col=FF981F>Salvaging Station</col> to identify your haul.

Valuable resources, sunken cargo, or even lost treasure await!

<col=9F9F9F>For this alpha, only low-level shipwrecks are accessible.], [12], [5511, 5490, 5491], [Where can I find a shipwreck?, Shipwrecks have been seen around the <col=FF981F>Bedabin Basin</col>, and south of <col=FF981F>Khazard's Channel</col>., How do I salvage a shipwreck?, To gather salvage, stop your boat next to a shipwreck and interact with the <col=FF981F>Salvaging Hook</col> facility on your boat., How do I identify salvage?, To identify your haul, visit a <col=FF981F>Salvaging Station</col> at a port with salvage in your inventory., How do I get a salvaging hook?, Visit a <col=FF981F>Shipyard</col> at a port to construct new facilities on your boat, including, but not limited to, salvaging hooks.], [31067], [3624], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 15, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5517 140 [[3], [Charting the Sea], [Seek out points of interest!], [All sorts of mysteries can be found in the nooks and crannies of the ocean!

Use your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> and <col=FF981F>Charting Tools</col> to discover secrets and chart the seas as you <col=FF981F>explore</col>. Keep your eye open for <col=FF981F>ripples</col>, <col=FF981F>interesting scenery</col>, or <col=FF981F>NPCs that need a hand</col>!

<col=9F9F9F>For this alpha, the number of available charting spots has been limited.], [5], [5498, 5493, 5500, 5499, 5501, 5502, 5503], [How do I chart the sea?, Your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> item will show you a list of <col=FF981F>locations</col> to chart, as well as any required <col=FF981F>tools</col>. Bring the tool to that location, and then keep an eye out for something interesting to chart!, How do I get a Captain's Log?, You can retrieve a new <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I get the tools I need?, You can retrieve <col=FF981F>Charting Tools</col> from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I use the spyglass?, To use the spyglass, look for <col=FF981F>ripples</col> around an area mentioned in your captain's log., How do I test currents?, You can chart currents using your <col=FF981F>Current Duck</col>. Once you have found the charting spot, deploy your Current Duck and follow it until it stops!, How do I get help from the mermaid guide?, To document water depth with a mermaid guide, you must solve their cryptic clue and tell them what the relevant items are. The clues are hard!, How do I help the weather troll?, To chart points involving a weather troll, you need to first fix their <col=FF981F>Portable Weather Station</col> using your <col=FF981F>Anti Rust Tonic</col>. Then, use it to find where the wind dies down - remember, you find calm <col=FF981F>in the eye of the storm!</col>], [30977], [3625], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 15, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5518 140 [[6], [Barracuda Trials], [Daredevil time-trials!], [The thrill-seeking Barracuda sailors are taking on a series of <col=FF981F>dangerous time-trials</col> around the sea. Do you have what it takes to achieve Marlin rank?

For the best ranks:
- <col=FF981F>Sail through rapids</col> to move faster
- Avoid storm clouds
- Collect every crate
- Keep your sails trimmed!

<col=9F9F9F>For this alpha, only one trial is available: The Tempor Tantrum.], [30], [5494, 5495, 5496, 5497], [How do I start the trial?, The Tempor Tantrum trial can be started by sailing to <col=FF981F>Rum-dashed Ralph</col> north of Tempoross Cove., Why am I taking damage?!, The stormy seas can only be navigated safely with <col=FF981F>a strong-enough sail</col>. In addition, the <col=FF981F>speed-boosting rapids</col> require a strong-enough <col=FF981F>hull</col> to use safely., How do I complete the trial?, To complete the Tempor Tantrum, sail south to collect a <col=FF981F>Rum Shipment</col> from the <col=FF981F>Merchant Ship</col>, then return it to <col=FF981F>Rum-dashed Ralph</col> as fast as possible. Higher ranks require more shipments delivered!, What are lost supplies?, Each rank requires an amount of <col=FF981F>Lost Supplies</col> to be recovered as you deliver shipments. Simply <col=FF981F>sail over them</col> to collect them!, How do I earn higher ranks?, Higher ranks can be earned by completing the trial within a time limit and collecting enough <col=FF981F>Lost Supplies</col>. See the Tasks tab for each rank's requirements., How do I go faster?, The <col=FF981F>route</col> you take is key to getting a fast time. In addition, sailing over <col=FF981F>Rapids</col> and <col=FF981F>trimming your sails</col> will make your boat move faster!], [27414], [3626], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 30, clear your inventory and equipment, and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
5519 140 [[4], [Exploration], [Discover new tales!], [The open seas hold many tales yet to be written! You never know what you'll stumble upon as you drift around the ocean.

Seek out <col=FF981F>small islands</col> to discover what they hold, and maybe see if anyone needs a hand at <col=FF981F>The Pandemonium</col>.], [15], [5504, 5505, 5506, 5507, 5508], [How do I disembark at an island with no dock?, Small islands have <col=FF981F>Mooring Points</col> instead of docks, for embarking and disembarking.], [2574], [3627], []]
5520 140 [[5], [The Shipyard], [Upgrade your boat!], [A higher-levelled sailor needs a higher-levelled boat!

Visit the Shipyard to upgrade and customise each part of your boat to <col=FF981F>withstand stormier seas</col>, <col=FF981F>complete quicker journeys</col>, or just make it look nicer!

You can also build new <col=FF981F>facilities</col> to give your boat new functions, like a Salvaging Hook to plunder sunken ships...

<col=9F9F9F>In this alpha, the amount of options is limited.], [10], [5513, 5509, 5510, 5512], [How do I get to the shipyard?, The shipyard can be accessed by talking to a <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPC</col>. One can be found around the south of Port Sarim., How do I change my boat's hull or sail?, You can change your hull and sail by checking the <col=FF981F>Boat Schematics</col> board in the Shipyard., How do I build facilities on my boat?, While in the Shipyard, click the <col=FF981F>gangplank</col> to board your boat. From there, you can interact with the <col=FF981F>hotspots</col> to build new facilities. Remember to bring a hammer and saw!, How do I leave my boat in the Shipyard?, While on your boat, click the <col=FF981F>gangplank</col> to return to the Shipyard dock.], [2949], [3628], []]
5521 140 [[7], [About], [Sailing Alpha details.], [Welcome to the <col=FF981F>Sailing Alpha</col>! A variety of features are on offer, each a part of the <col=FF981F>Sailing skill</col>. Try them out, and share your feedback with us through the linked survey or social media.

Please note the following:

- Sailing is heavily work-in-progress. <col=FF981F>Gameplay and graphics are not final.</col>

- XP rates and rewards are not yet balanced.

- You may experience flickering and other graphical issues in non-sailing content.], [1], None, [What can I try in the alpha?, The following features are available to try:
- Boat movement and navigation
- Intro quest
- Port Tasks
- Shipwreck salvaging
- Charting the Sea
- Barracuda Trials
- Customisation at the Shipyard
- Prying Times miniquest
- The Pandemonium island, What else is planned that is not in the alpha?, The following features are planned, but not available in the alpha:
- Combat at sea
- NPC crewmates
- Deep sea trawling
- NPC boats
- More quests
- More islands, When will Sailing launch?, We hope Sailing to be ready <col=FF981F>later this year</col>, if all goes well!], [7542], [3629], [Resetting the alpha will clear all progress. Are you sure you wish to continue?]]
5522 125
5523 125
5524 142 [[1], [Courier wanted], [0], [1], [0], [5178], [5178], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31078, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [I accidentally received this crate of steel swords. Luckily I made a good deal with some pirates on the Pandemonium to buy them, but I need someone reliable to transfer the crate for me.
- Brian]]
5525 142 [[2], [Lonely crate looking for local courier], [0], [10], [0], [5178], [5178], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31079, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [I've got some surplus stock I need to shift while it's fresh. The Shrimp and Parrot have agreed to take the crate off my hands. Hasty delivery to Musa Point required.
- Gerrant]]
5526 142 [[3], [Banana delivery], [0], [10], [0], [5178], [5181], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31080, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [My shop is running low on bananas. I need a reliable sailor to fetch me a crate of them from Musa Point and bring them back to Port Sarim.
- Wydin]]
5527 142 [[4], [Banana compensation], [0], [10], [0], [5178], [5178], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31081, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [The last courier I hired returned with an entire crate full of rotten bananas. Luthas won't replace them without proof, so I need someone to return them, post haste!
- Wydin]]
5528 142 [[5], [A bartender's problem], [0], [9], [0], [5178], [5178], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31082, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [I've received a request from the bartender on the Pandemonium asking for some extra beer. Seems they've been getting more traffic than normal. I need a sailor to get there as soon as possible.
- Russell, The owner of the Rusty Anchor]]
5529 142 [[6], [Logs astray], [0], [10], [0], [5178], [5181], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31083, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [We accidentally took an extra shipment of logs when we docked at Port Sarim. The crewmate responsible is now scrubbing our decks. Please pick up the logs and return them to Port Sarim.
- Captain Wilbur]]
5530 142 [[7], [Rum run], [0], [15], [0], [5178], [5178], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31085, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [I want to try some mainland rum. Everyone says our Karamjan rum is the best, but how can I know without trying the alternatives? Fetch me some from Port Sarim.
- Zambo]]
5531 142 [[8], [Legal' courier services requested], [0], [15], [0], [5178], [5181], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31086, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [We need someone <str>gullible</str> capable to take this completely legal crate containing only bananas to Port Sarim.
- 'Plantation workers']]
5532 142 [[9], [Keg removal services required], [0], [7], [0], [5178], [5179], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31087, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [Yo ho ho! Business is booming, but unfortunately, our next keg collection date isn't till next week! Looking for a Jolly Roger to collect them from the Pandemonium and drop them off in Port Sarim.
- Steve Beanie]]
5533 142 [[10], [Bait to Catherby], [0], [21], [0], [5178], [5178], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31088, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [Something went wrong and I received a shipment of bait which was due for Catherby. I need a sailor who can navigate safely past Crandor to take it there for me. Give Harry my regards.
- Gerrant]]
5534 142 [[11], [Sarah's potatoes], [0], [26], [0], [5178], [5178], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31089, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [I've been looking to diversify my income streams. There's a chef in Catherby who is interested in using some of my home grown potatoes in some of his recipes. I need three crates taking to him, preferably before they sprout roots.
- Sarah]]
5535 142 [[12], [A mislaid port order], [0], [25], [0], [5178], [5183], [5186], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31090, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5629], [I received a work order to deliver some compost from Ellena in Catherby to Praistan in Brimhaven. I'm not sure why it ended up here in Port Sarim, but can't help that now. I need a sailor to head to Catherby and pick up the shipment before delivering it to Brimhaven.
- Port Sarim Port Master]]
5536 142 [[13], [Salamander protection], [0], [36], [0], [5178], [5178], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31091, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [I don't know who did it, but someone left two crates full of red salamanders on my doorstep. Perhaps they thought they were newts? I need someone to take them to Ardougne for me. I know someone there who can release them back into their natural habitat.
- Betty]]
5537 142 [[14], [Tar export required], [0], [30], [1], [5178], [5178], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31092, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [I've got an order of swamp tar that needs delivering to the general store in Port Khazard. Don't worry about leakage. I've already floured the inside of the crate to keep it sealed tight.
- Tarquin, Tar merchant]]
5538 142 [[15], [Sword identification], [0], [46], [1], [5178], [5188], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31093, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [I sent some rusty swords to be cleaned up by Tindel in Port Khazard a couple of weeks ago and I need someone to go and fetch them for me. Don't try to steal from me. I know exactly how many I sent out and I'll know if a sword went missing!
- Bandit, Owner of the esteemed Varrock sword shop]]
5539 142 [[100], [Armour courier], [0], [1], [0], [5178], [5178], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31112, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [I need someone to deliver this crate of armour to the Pandemonium for me. Some legitimate businessmen there wish to use it for their adventures at sea.
- Horvik]]
5540 142 [[101], [Spices needed], [0], [1], [0], [5178], [5179], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31114, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [I have some very important spices I need collecting from the Pandemonium and delivering to Port Sarim. They are essential in some new concoctions I have planned.
- Hetty]]
5541 142 [[16], [Fresh lobster delivery], [0], [21], [0], [5183], [5183], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31094, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [There's a rowdy pirate at Musa Point who insists that the lobsters caught there taste better than those caught in Catherby, I don't care for the dispute personally, but I'm happy to send some of ours over all the same. Care is required handling the crates. Lobsters are at their freshest when they are alive.
- Harry]]
5542 142 [[17], [Wax, wax and more wax], [0], [21], [0], [5183], [5183], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31096, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [I received a request for an abundance of wax to go to the Pandemonium. I don't know what it's for and I frankly don't care, especially at the price they're paying me.
- Candle Maker]]
5543 142 [[18], [Caleb's Coconuts], [0], [21], [0], [5183], [5179], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31097, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [I've heard that there's a new type of coconut on the Pandemonium. Go fetch me some so I can experiment with some new dishes. Two crates should be enough.
- Caleb Fitzharmon]]
5544 142 [[19], [Vials to the holy island], [0], [22], [0], [5183], [5183], [5184], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31098, 8], None, None, None, None, None, [5632], [I've got a massive delivery of vials that need taking to Entrana. The previous sailor was denied access, so make sure you don't have any weapons or armour on you. The monks don't take kindly to those who break their rules.
- Catherby Port Master]]
5545 142 [[20], [Misplaced silk], [0], [28], [0], [5183], [5183], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31099, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [Another sailor decided to dump his cargo here instead of going to Ardougne. There's five crates for the Ardougne silk merchant. I need someone else to take them there.
- Catherby Port Master]]
5546 142 [[21], [Pineapple madness], [0], [26], [0], [5183], [5186], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31100, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [For some reason, our charter ship services are always swamped with people who want pineapples. Most of the others don't have this problem and we won't be getting more for some time. We need an emergency resupply to keep up with demand. Looking for someone with a fast ship to fetch us some crates from Brimhaven.
- Catherby Charter Ship Services]]
5547 142 [[22], [Shrimp for the Shrimp and Parrot], [0], [31], [0], [5183], [5183], [5186], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31101, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5629], [Got a delivery of fresh fish to be taken to the Shrimp and Parrot in Brimhaven. I'd hurry if I were you. I hear the owner associates with pirates and he won't be happy if the fish are spoiled when he gets them.
- Harry]]
5548 142 [[23], [Cabbage crazy], [0], [31], [1], [5183], [5183], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31102, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [A sickly man asked me if I could grow him some cabbages and send them down to Ardougne. I couldn't believe when he asked me for five crates worth! Cabbages are normally below my pay grade, but it's a nice change from watermelons I suppose.
- Dantaera]]
5549 142 [[24], [GPDT Fast-track required], [0], [36], [1], [5183], [5187], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31103, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [I purchased two crates of steel arrowtips weeks ago and they still haven't arrived. I need a someone with a boat to head down to Ardougne and get them for me. I'm done waiting for the GPDT to eventually get around to it.
- Hickton]]
5550 142 [[25], [Need help with a karambwan delivery], [0], [36], [1], [5183], [5186], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31104, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [I've finally managed to persuade the old man in Brimhaven to send me a crate of karambwan. I need someone to head over there and fetch it for me.
- Caleb Fitzharmon]]
5551 142 [[26], [Khazard rennovations], [0], [30], [1], [5183], [5183], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31105, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [Port Khazard has been going through some major changes with the sudden increase in sailing activity of late. They require someone to deliver four crates of oak planks to them to help with some rennovations.
- Catherby Port Master]]
5552 142 [[27], [Charter stock redistribution], [0], [46], [1], [5183], [5188], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31106, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [We can't keep up with the demand for soda ash, seaweed and buckets of sand! Our fellow crew over at Port Khazard have agreed to send more over, but it's going to be a while before we can collect them ourselves. We need someone to sail over to Port Khazard and collect them for us.
- Catherby Charter Ship Services]]
5553 142 [[28], [Got some coal that needs exporting], [0], [51], [1], [5183], [5183], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31107, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [Got a request for some coal by some guy down at Port Khazard. If you could deliver it for me that'd be much appreciated.
- Stankers]]
5554 142 [[29], [Silver for Ardougne], [0], [56], [1], [5183], [5183], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31108, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [Someone misdelivered a shipment of silver jewellery that was intended for Ardougne. Looking for someone heading that way to take it with them. We'll compensate you well for the mismanagement on our part.
- Catherby Port Master]]
5555 142 [[30], [Urgent request for the Spirit Anglers of Unkah!], [0], [50], [1], [5183], [5183], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31109, 8], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [The spirit anglers over in Unkah need a constant delivery of buckets to keep fighting off Tempoross. I've fallen sick and can't make the delivery. If someone could do it on my behalf, that'd be appreciated.
- A sailor in need]]
5556 142 [[31], [Murphy's catch of the day], [0], [41], [1], [5188], [5188], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31110, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [I'm in constant need of sailors to take my hauls to Ardougne. Anyone willing to deliver a few crates would have my thanks.
- Murphy]]
5557 142 [[32], [Gold rush], [0], [41], [1], [5188], [5186], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31111, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [Gold is always in constant demand in Ardougne, but the closest mine is over in Brimhaven. I'll pay any sailor well if they can bring five crates of gold ore from Brimhaven to Ardougne.
- Ardougne Gold Merchant]]
5558 142 [[33], [Mithril for our fleet], [0], [41], [1], [5188], [5187], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31112, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [Our fleet is in need of additional armour. Zenesha in Ardougne is willing to provide, but we require a sailor who can make the trip there and back to pick up our delivery.
- Khazard Captain]]
5559 142 [[34], [Bert's sand delivery], [0], [41], [1], [5188], [5188], [5184], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31113, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [5632], [I need to refill the sand pit over in Entrana and am willing to pay a sailor to make the journey for me. I'd advise you to avoid taking weapons or armour though. The monks on the island don't take too kindly to that sort of thing.
- Bert]]
5560 142 [[35], [Discretion required], [0], [46], [1], [5188], [5183], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31115, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [We need someone discrete to pick up some 'stuff' from Catherby for us. The contents of the crates are not important to you, so no peeking. We'll know if you do.
- Nobody important]]
5561 142 [[36], [Dragon equipment to Myths' Guild], [0], [46], [1], [5188], [5188], [5189], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31116, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5631], [There are some crates of dragon weaponry bound for the Myths' Guild. We need a boat to take them down to Corsair Cove.
- Port Khazard Port Master]]
5562 142 [[37], [Emergency beer supply request], [0], [51], [1], [5188], [5181], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31082, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [We've got an emergency on our hands. The sudden increase in pirates in the area has caused us to run out of beer, again. We've already purchased what we can from Ardougne and Brimhaven, so we need someone to go all the way over to Musa Point instead. Five crates should last us until our next delivery.
- Angor, Fight Arena Bartender]]
5563 142 [[38], [Spirit angler supply order], [0], [51], [1], [5188], [5188], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31117, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [Got a parts request from them spirit anglers down in Unkah. Seems their ships have taken a bit of a beating and need some repairs. There are five crates here with the materials they need.
- Sarah]]
5564 142 [[39], [Need help with cargo recovery], [0], [56], [1], [5188], [5191], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31118, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [Some idiot took three crates of dragon equipment bound for Corsair Cove and dropped them off at Unkah instead. I'm not sure how they messed that up, but we're willing to pay a premium to anyone who can fetch them back here again.
- Port Khazard Port Master]]
5565 142 [[40], [Outfitting the anglers], [0], [50], [1], [5188], [5187], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31119, 6], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [There's a shipment of spirit angler's equipment over at Ardougne that needs taking to Unkah. GPDT won't touch them. Scared of getting caught in that Tempoross storm.
- Port Khazard Port Master]]
5566 142 [[41], [Angler's outfit recovery], [0], [61], [2], [5188], [5191], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31120, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [I need someone to head over to Unkah and collect some angler's outfits from the spirit anglers over there. Seems all the kids these days want to wear the new fancy blue garb instead of appreciating the classics.
- Murphy]]
5567 142 [[42], [Banana collection], [0], [50], [1], [5191], [5181], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31080, 5], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [Fresh fruits from Karamja are really popular over here in Pollnivneach. There is a shipment of bananas over at Musa Point that needs collecting.
- Ali]]
5568 142 [[43], [Equipment requisition], [0], [50], [1], [5191], [5187], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31136, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [I have a shipment of fishing supplies needed to help take care of Tempoross. You can collect it over in Ardougne.
- Ishmael]]
5569 142 [[44], [Got some granite that needs delivering], [0], [50], [1], [5191], [5191], [5186], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31137, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5629], [High quality granite requested from the Ruins of Unkah to be distributed all over Karamja.
- Brimhaven Port Master]]

Requesting a shipment of high quality Kharidian silk.
- Catherby Port Master]]

Could another shipment of silk be delivered to Ardougne?
- Ardougne Silk Merchant]]
5573 142 [[48], [Cocktail express], [0], [62], [1], [5191], [5179], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31139, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [I heard there's a bar out at sea called the Pandemonium or something. I've requested a shipment of their best cocktails to be delivered to Unkah. I just need someone to collect it.
- Ali]]
5574 142 [[49], [Cactus experiments], [0], [62], [1], [5191], [5191], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31140, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [Some druids have been interested in the effects that cacti have on potions. I would like to request a small shipment to be sent to Port Sarim.
- Jatix]]
5575 142 [[50], [Food storage resupply], [0], [65], [2], [5191], [5191], [5189], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31101, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5631], [Recently the fishers have been having some bad luck, so we are requesting a delivery of fish to replenish the stores.
- Corsair Cove Port Master]]
5576 142 [[51], [Coral experiments], [0], [65], [2], [5191], [5190], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31141, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [We have heard that the tortugans have access to all sorts of interesting coral. We are very keen on acquiring some for experiments.

5577 142 [[52], [Construction supplies], [0], [71], [2], [5191], [5191], [5190], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31142, 7], None, None, None, None, None, [5657], [We have heard the mines north of Unkah produce good quality sandstone. We would like some to repair our houses after a recent gryphon attack.
- Summer Shore Port Master]]
5578 142 [[79], [Fish delivery], [0], [1], [0], [5179], [5179], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31079, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [Gerrant in Port Sarim is struggling to keep his store stocked with fish, so I've made a deal to send some of my excess over. I need someone quick and reliable to get the fish to him.
- Henderson]]
5579 142 [[80], [Fish for 'The Face'], [0], [1], [0], [5179], [5179], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31101, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [Someone calling themselves 'The Face' apparently needs a large amount of fish to feed their 'clients' with. Seems a bit weird, but they're paying well. I need someone to make the delivery to Port Sarim for me.
- Henderson]]
5580 142 [[81], [Billy-no-ship-parts], [0], [10], [0], [5179], [5179], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31117, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [Sally over at Musa Point has only gone and run out of ship parts! Classic! I've agreed to send her some of my excess bits. I just need a top sailor to take them over there for me.
- Junior Jim]]
5581 142 [[82], [Secret pirate buisness], [0], [10], [0], [5179], [5179], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31115, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [I need a top Jolly Roger to help me conduct some super secret pirate business. Just take the crate of secret stuff to Musa Point, no questions asked.
- Steve Beanie]]
5582 142 [[83], [We need more rum!], [0], [11], [0], [5179], [5181], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31085, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [The rum is gone! I definitely ordered in the right amount, so it is most likely certainly maybe guaranteed to not be my fault. I need someone to drop their stern and sail over to Musa Point to collect some more!
- Steve Beanie]]
5583 142 [[84], [Steel collection], [0], [1], [0], [5179], [5178], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31127, 1], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [Thanks to some top parleying, I've got my hands on some steel bars. They're coming through Port Sarim, so I need someone to pick them up there and bring them to the Pandemonium.
- Parleying Preston]]
5584 142 [[85], [Jewellery delivery], [0], [9], [0], [5179], [5179], [5178], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31108, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5627], [I've got a couple of crates of jewellery acquired through entirely legitimate means. I need someone to deliver them to Port Sarim for me.
- One Eyed Rosalee]]
5585 142 [[86], [Return to sender], [0], [15], [0], [5179], [5179], [5181], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31081, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5633], [I thought a merchant vessel was carrying valuable goods from Musa Point, but it turned out to just be a lot of bananas. Could someone take them back for me? The original ship unfortunately ran into some problems at sea.
- Captain Harry Robin]]
5586 142 [[87], [Pirate grog delivery], [0], [21], [0], [5179], [5179], [5183], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31084, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5630], [Yo ho ho! I need a top sailor to set out on a pirate adventure for me. I have a couple of crates of grog that need taking to Catherby. Hoist your anchor and get to it!
- Steve Beanie]]
5587 142 [[88], [In need of arrowtips], [0], [21], [0], [5179], [5183], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31103, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [I need a couple of crates of steel arrowtips collecting from Catherby and delivering to the Pandemonium. They'll be very useful for an upcoming party I'm planning with the Customs and Excise Office
- One Eyed Rosalee]]
5588 142 [[89], [Pineapple collection], [0], [26], [0], [5179], [5186], [5179], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31121, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5634], [One of my usual captains has fallen ill, so I need someone to quickly step in. I've got some crates of pineapples in Brimhaven that need collecting and bringing back here.
- Fiora]]
5589 142 [[90], [Sending sand], [0], [28], [0], [5179], [5179], [5187], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31113, 4], None, None, None, None, None, [5628], [Trader Stan's lot still aren't delivering to Ardougne directly, so it seems there's a business opportunity here. I've found a partner there willing to buy as much sand as I can send. I just need someone to make the voyage.
- John Johnson]]
5590 142 [[91], [Cocktails for all], [0], [50], [0], [5179], [5179], [5191], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31139, 2], None, None, None, None, None, [5637], [I've got a few cocktails of my own creation that I'd like sending over to the hard workers at the Ruins of Unkah. I still owe them for a small issue they helped with a while back while I was on pirate business. Jolly Roger!
- Steve Beanie]]
5591 142 [[92], [Urgent delivery], [0], [30], [1], [5179], [5179], [5188], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [31151, 3], None, None, None, None, None, [5635], [Apparently some foolish sailors in Port Khazard have been making voyages without protection against the Curse of Hawkeyed Mildred! - Ribs]]

- Port Sarim port master]]

- Port Sarim port master]]

- Asyff]]
